themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "Alcuin of York on COMMENTARY ON REVELATION: And the angel, whom I saw standing upon the sea a...". Word-study detail reinforces "ἥλιος: the sun - the sun; by implication, light".
